subject: A vampire figure grinning while lifting stylized goggles, surrounded by cobwebs and fungus in a purple-lit environment
description: A close-up portrait of a vampire — visible fangs, red-tinted eyes — grinning broadly as they push stylized dark goggles up from their eyes. The figure wears layered, textured clothing in purples and greys and carries what appears to be a small device or gadget near the shoulder. The background is filled with cobwebs strung between structures, and flat mushroom-like or fungal shapes can be seen in the upper right. The overall palette is deep purple, violet, and dusky pink, giving the setting a Gothic-horror Duskmourn aesthetic. The expression is one of charming menace — an unsettlingly pleased smile. No explicit Valgavoth cult symbols (moth, swallowed sun, cherry-wood door) are visible in this crop.
foreground: Vampire figure with fangs and red-tinted eyes, grinning, pushing goggles up with one hand, gadget or device near shoulder
background: Cobwebs and fungal/mushroom shapes in deep purple and violet shadow
